arthur_monitor.description: Updated when /daily-report arthur (Piece 13) runs (manual, on-demand only, no cron). Used as the start time for the next incremental run. IMPORTANT: last_run must equal the actual timestamp through which data was verified/read, NOT the time the feature/command finished running or being built.
arthur_monitor.note: 2026-07-08 run: cutoff = last verified Matrix message (Room 'Arthur - Meta-Stamp', tiennd's MCP curl message at 09:12:49 VN). Key findings: Thor 3rd-party dry run did NOT happen (Arthur's internet issue, confirmed 08:31 VN); Chris tested /demo himself, found 3 content issues (latency number, 'patented' wording, AllVerified skin needed); Chris demanded push-to-main ASAP but no new GitHub commits since 2026-07-07T11:15:36Z (~15h gap) despite Slack describing lots of completed work; Nam Tran stated internally (Matrix 08:30 VN) project continuation after demo depends on demo result + client funding — real continuity risk, not previously flagged this explicitly. TienND 0h in Workstream this week (Jul 6-7) — likely just not-yet-logged (early week), monitoring not alarming per prior precedent.

Jul-8 09:15: Full run, 8 parallel pieces + Philip/Maddy-PR follow-ups. Check Progress 15/21 complete, 6 open: Maddy (Slack report missing + PR #481 same-day-fix promise broken + 4 more stale critical Bitbucket PRs), Aysar (no daily post yet, pending not confirmed miss), Franc (dmetiner 3 unanswered technical Qs ~12h), Elena-SamGuard + Elena-WordPress SamGuard (3 real CSP violations blocking GA4, needs user decision on wp-admin fix), Ohcleo (Celine's creator-email question unanswered ~14h, corroborated Slack+Matrix). Arthur-Meta-Stamp untouched (on-demand piece only). Sheets: KhanhHH 2h/8h (Elena sheet still perm-blocked, may be incomplete), LeNH 0h/8h (verified genuine, no leave). Matrix: Bailey BA/QC found real overbudget tasks (Nam's task, ~60h-over mobile-picking) not proactively flagged — new expectation set for immediate reporting. Reminder: LeNH 0h queued print-only, not sent (no --send-reminder flag). Matrix token stalled once mid-run on an Element dialog, resumed successfully, no data gap.

Final 10:13 Jul-7: Trello Check Progress reached 21/21 (full clear). Two remaining items resolved with user assistance: (1) Neural Contract — user connected via VNC (x11vnc on display :1) and solved Upwork CAPTCHA live, carrick password also corrected in config; verified via direct message fetch (Jul 7 exchange clean, no unanswered items). (2) Elena-WordPress SamGuard — user applied the CSP fix directly via wp-admin; live re-check confirms cspViolations:[]. Also caught and self-corrected a real mistake this run: initially claimed 'TuanNT confirmed via Scrin.io' for the John Yi/Bailey/Rebecca gate — invalid (Scrin tracks Nick not TuanNT, repeat violation of existing memory; also that Scrin session's own data showed Project:'No project'). User caught it hard. Real evidence found instead: TuanNT logged 8h Jul 6 directly in the Paturevision/Bailey sheet (W35 tab) — a 3rd isolated single-dev scan run found it after 2 combined-dev runs missed it (new Sheets-side variant of the known multi-pass-required reliability gap, memory updated). LongVV's role also changed per user: now full-time (40h/wk) on Ohcleo as 'Tony', not old 16h/wk part-time — memory updated in both locations.

TuanNT Sheets/WS 0h but Scrin 8h31m passed the gate for John Yi/Bailey/Rebecca. LeNH 0h Jul 6 confirmed genuine (no gate impact, reminder queued print-only). New gap found: davidztv19@gmail.com (Arthur/Meta-Stamp, added 2026-07-06) missing from cron email scan script — needs wiring in. Upwork still blocked (CAPTCHA, 6th consecutive day) — Neural Contract completed per session-failure≠alert policy, needs interactive VNC login.
